revenue_recognition.policy: Franchise fees recognized when distinct performance obligations substantially satisfied. Pre-opening services (training, site selection) are distinct and upfront. Other fee components deferred until obligations performed.

accounts_receivable.method: reserve for financial, direct write-off for tax

cash_flows.definition: cash on hand and in banks

estimates.policy: Management makes estimates affecting assets/liabilities and revenues/expenses. Actual results may differ significantly.

long_lived_assets.impairment_policy: Reviewed when events indicate; no adjustments recorded

fair_value.policy: Financial instruments approximate carrying value due to short maturity

risk_factors.legal_regulatory: Changes in legal/regulatory environment may create unanticipated costs
risk_factors.concentration: All fees derived from customer services; subject to marketplace conditions
risk_factors.credit: Risk that customers may not pay; monitored via active collections

franchise_sales_note: Company started offering franchises October 2024. Zero franchise agreements executed as of Dec 31, 2024.

inception_balance_sheet_sep2024.note: Balance sheet only — no income statement or cash flow for inception period
